controls.title: Threat Intelligence
controls.description: Information relating to information security threats shall be collected and analyzed to produce threat intelligence.

controls.title: Information Security in Project Management
controls.description: Information security shall be integrated into project management.

controls.title: Inventory of Information and Other Associated Assets
controls.description: An inventory of information and other associated assets shall be developed and maintained.

controls.title: Acceptable Use of Information and Other Associated Assets
controls.description: Rules for the acceptable use of information and assets shall be documented and implemented.

controls.title: Return of Assets
controls.description: Assets shall be returned upon termination or change of employment.

controls.title: Information Transfer
controls.description: Information transfer rules and procedures shall be established.

controls.title: Access Control
controls.description: Rules to control physical and logical access to information shall be established.

controls.title: Information Security for Use of Cloud Services
controls.description: Processes for acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services shall be established.

controls.title: Information Security Incident Management Planning and Preparation
controls.description: The organization shall plan and prepare for managing information security incidents.

controls.title: Assessment and Decision on Information Security Events
controls.description: Information security events shall be assessed and decision made on classification as incidents.

controls.title: Response to Information Security Incidents
controls.description: Information security incidents shall be responded to in accordance with documented procedures.

controls.title: Legal, Statutory, Regulatory and Contractual Requirements
controls.description: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements shall be identified and documented.

controls.title: Privacy and Protection of Personal Identifiable Information (PII)
controls.description: The organization shall identify and comply with PII protection requirements.

controls.title: Initial Access
controls.description: Techniques used to gain initial foothold within a network.

controls.title: Execution
controls.description: Techniques that result in execution of adversary-controlled code.

controls.title: Privilege Escalation
controls.description: Techniques used to gain higher-level permissions.

controls.title: Defense Evasion
controls.description: Techniques used to avoid detection.

controls.title: Discovery
controls.description: Techniques used to gain knowledge about the system and network.

controls.title: Lateral Movement
controls.description: Techniques used to move through a network.

controls.title: Command and Control
controls.description: Techniques used to communicate with controlled systems.

controls.title: Impact
controls.description: Techniques to disrupt availability or compromise integrity.

controls.title: Inventory and Control of Enterprise Assets
controls.description: Actively manage all enterprise assets.

controls.title: Inventory and Control of Software Assets
controls.description: Actively manage all software assets.

controls.title: Account Management
controls.description: Manage accounts and authentication.

controls.title: Application Software Security
controls.description: Manage security of application software.

controls.title: Incident Reporting
controls.description: Mandatory reporting of cyber security incidents to CERT-In.

controls.title: Data Retention
controls.description: Logs and records shall be retained for specified periods.

controls.title: Synchronized Timekeeping
controls.description: Systems shall maintain synchronized time.
